narrative: US data outperforming boosts USD; gold lower -1.03% on Fed rate hike bets and US-Iran tensions. Equities +0.79%; DXY +0.21%; VIX 16.9. EUR/USD holds near 1.1395 as ECB's Wunsch keeps options open for July and September rate decisions; Fed 3.75% (ON HOLD) vs ECB 2.25% (HIKING) — 150bp carry favors USD. Watch United States ISM Manufacturing PMI at 14:00 UTC.
